title: Robust genetic codes enhance protein evolvability
author: Hana Rozhonova
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
The repository contains all data for our manuscript on protein evolvability under rewired genetic codes: https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2023.06.20.545706v1 

 The corresponding code is available on GitHub: https://github.com/parizkh/rewired_codes_landscapes
